content.json:
## ESU Assignment Tracker
Track Extended Security Updates registration for end-of-life and approaching-EOL Windows Server and SQL Server versions.

### Windows Server 2012 — EOL: **10 Oct 2023**   |   Windows Server 2016 — EOL: **12 Jan 2027**   |   SQL Server 2012 — EOL: **12 Jul 2022**   |   SQL Server 2014 — EOL: **9 Jul 2024**   |   SQL Server 2016 — EOL: **14 Jul 2026**

content.query:
resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| extend osSku = tostring(properties.osSku)
| extend ESU = tostring(properties.licenseProfile.esuProfile.licenseAssignmentState)
| where osSku contains 'Windows Server 2012'
| summarize ServerCount = count() by ESU
content.title: Windows 2012 ESU Status

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| extend mssqlDiscovered = properties.mssqlDiscovered
| where mssqlDiscovered == 'true'
| extend machineId = tolower(tostring(id))
| join kind=inner (
    resources
    | where type == 'microsoft.azurearcdata/sqlserverinstances'
    | extend version = tostring(properties.version)
    | extend edition = properties.edition
    | extend containerId = tolower(tostring(properties.containerResourceId))
    | where version contains '2012'
    | where edition in ('Enterprise', 'Standard')
    | where isnotempty(containerId)
    | distinct containerId
) on $left.machineId == $right.containerId
| join kind=inner (
    resources
    | where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines/extensions'
    | where properties.type in ('WindowsAgent.SqlServer', 'LinuxAgent.SqlServer')
    | extend machineIdExt = tolower(iff(id contains '/extensions/WindowsAgent.SqlServer' or id contains '/extensions/LinuxAgent.SqlServer', substring(id, 0, indexof(id, '/extensions/')), ''))
    | extend ESU = iff(isnotnull(properties.settings.enableExtendedSecurityUpdates), iff(properties.settings.enableExtendedSecurityUpdates == true, 'enabled', 'disabled'), 'N/A')
    | project machineIdExt, ESU
) on $left.machineId == $right.machineIdExt
| summarize count() by ESU
content.title: SQL Server 2012 ESU Status

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.azurearcdata/sqlserverinstances'
| where tostring(properties.version) contains '2014'
| extend edition = tostring(properties.edition)
| summarize Servers = count() by edition
content.title: SQL Server 2014 by Edition

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| extend osSku = tostring(properties.osSku)
| where osSku contains 'Windows Server 2012'
| extend esuLicense = tostring(properties.licenseProfile.esuProfile.licenseAssignmentState)
| where esuLicense == 'NotAssigned'
| extend application = tostring(tags.Application)
| summarize ServerCount = count() by application
content.title: Win 2012 ESU Not Assigned by Application

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| where properties.osType == 'windows'
| where tostring(properties.osSku) contains 'Windows Server 2012'
| extend edition = iff(tostring(properties.osSku) contains 'Datacenter', 'Datacenter', 'Standard')
| summarize serverCount = count() by edition
content.title: Win 2012 Standard vs Datacenter

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.azurearcdata/sqlserverinstances'
| where tostring(properties.version) contains '2012'
| extend edition = tostring(properties.edition)
| summarize serverCount = count() by edition
content.title: SQL 2012 Editions

content.json:
---
### Windows Server 2016 & SQL Server 2016 — Approaching End of Life

content.query:
resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| extend osSku = tostring(properties.osSku)
| extend ESU = tostring(properties.licenseProfile.esuProfile.licenseAssignmentState)
| where osSku contains 'Windows Server 2016'
| summarize ServerCount = count() by ESU
content.title: Windows 2016 ESU Status

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.azurearcdata/sqlserverinstances'
| where tostring(properties.version) contains '2016'
| extend edition = tostring(properties.edition)
| summarize Servers = count() by edition
content.title: SQL Server 2016 by Edition

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| where properties.osType == 'windows'
| where tostring(properties.osSku) contains 'Windows Server 2016'
| extend edition = iff(tostring(properties.osSku) contains 'Datacenter', 'Datacenter', 'Standard')
| summarize serverCount = count() by edition
content.title: Win 2016 Standard vs Datacenter

content.query:
resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| extend osSku = tostring(properties.osSku)
| where osSku contains 'Windows Server 2016'
| extend esuLicense = tostring(properties.licenseProfile.esuProfile.licenseAssignmentState)
| join kind=inner (
    resourcecontainers
    | where type == 'microsoft.resources/subscriptions'
    | project subscriptionId, subscriptionName = name
) on subscriptionId
| project subscriptionName, resourceGroup, esuLicense
| summarize ServerCount = count() by subscriptionName, resourceGroup, esuLicense
content.title: Win 2016 ESU by Subscription & Resource Group

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.azurearcdata/sqlserverinstances'
| where tostring(properties.version) contains '2016'
| extend sqlEdition = tostring(properties.edition)
| join kind=inner (
    resourcecontainers
    | where type == 'microsoft.resources/subscriptions'
    | project subscriptionId, subscriptionName = name
) on subscriptionId
| project subscriptionName, resourceGroup, sqlEdition
| summarize instanceCount = count() by subscriptionName, resourceGroup, sqlEdition
content.title: SQL 2016 by Subscription & Resource Group

content.query:
resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| extend esuEligibility = tostring(properties.licenseProfile.esuProfile.esuEligibility)
| where esuEligibility == 'Eligible'
| extend ESUAttached = iff(properties.licenseProfile.esuProfile.licenseAssignmentState == 'Assigned', 1, 0)
| join kind=inner (
    resourcecontainers
    | where type == 'microsoft.resources/subscriptions'
    | project subscriptionId, subscriptionName = name
) on subscriptionId
| summarize percentESUAssigned = toint(round(todouble(sum(ESUAttached)) / count() * 100, 2)) by subscriptionName
content.title: % Windows ESU Assigned by Subscription

content.query:
resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.hybridcompute/machines'
| extend osSku = tostring(properties.osSku)
| where osSku contains 'Windows Server 2012'
| extend esuLicense = tostring(properties.licenseProfile.esuProfile.licenseAssignmentState)
| join kind=inner (
    resourcecontainers
    | where type == 'microsoft.resources/subscriptions'
    | project subscriptionId, subscriptionName = name
) on subscriptionId
| project subscriptionName, resourceGroup, esuLicense
| summarize ServerCount = count() by subscriptionName, resourceGroup, esuLicense
content.title: Win 2012 ESU by Subscription & Resource Group

content.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.azurearcdata/sqlserverinstances'
| where tostring(properties.version) contains '2014'
| extend sqlEdition = tostring(properties.edition)
| join kind=inner (
    resourcecontainers
    | where type == 'microsoft.resources/subscriptions'
    | project subscriptionId, subscriptionName = name
) on subscriptionId
| project subscriptionName, resourceGroup
| summarize instanceCount = count() by subscriptionName, resourceGroup
content.title: SQL 2014 by Subscription & Resource Group
